sizing_rule.note: Optimal f adjusted downward for simultaneous multi-system trading (2+ systems). Original optimal_f=4.347826 represents fractional capital allocation when E≈0.23 with equal system weightings (0.92 each). Apply as fraction of account due to geometric growth efficiency loss from reduced recapitalization frequency in portfolio context.

source_rule_text: When trading multiple simultaneous market systems, position size must account for reduced recapitalization frequency compared to single-system trading, as simultaneous wagering creates efficiency loss in geometric growth.
